text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You guys, you guys! Tomorrow the crepe<n>place is
going to be half off! We should<n>go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Great idea! I'll obviously have the El<n>Special!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El Special? Is that what you ordered last<n>time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Claro! It's an egg and sausage crepe with<n>lots and
LOTS of hot sauce! The perfect<n>crepe for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll get the vanilla ice cream crepe<n>made
with real Hokkaido milk! ♪ How<n>about you,
Grass?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I'll get the red bean and<n>matcha syrup
crepe. I just love how<n>subtle the sweetness is...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Japanese-style crepes do sound good! ♪<n>All
right, I can't wait until tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, then you'd better get studying...<n>Failing
tomorrow's quiz will result in<n>extra lessons, and
that means no crepes.
